pdf_generator.title: Decklist PDF Generator
pdf_generator.subtitle: Generate official tournament decklist PDFs for Yu-Gi-Oh! events
pdf_generator.deck_code_placeholder: Paste your Yu-Gi-Oh! deck code here...
pdf_generator.deck_code_help: Paste the complete deck code from your deck building application. This must be validated before proceeding.
pdf_generator.deck_validation_success: Deck code validated successfully! You can now fill in the remaining fields.
pdf_generator.deck_validation_error_invalid: Invalid deck code. Please check your deck code and try again.
pdf_generator.deck_validation_error_failed: Failed to validate deck code. Please try again.
pdf_generator.deck_validation_error_connection: Error validating deck code. Please check your connection and try again.
pdf_generator.card_game_id_placeholder: Enter your official Card Game ID
pdf_generator.pdf_generated_success: PDF generated successfully! Your download should start automatically.
pdf_generator.pdf_generation_failed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
